Question: Evaluate the triple integral $$\int_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = \pi} \int_{r = 0}^{r = 1} \int_{z = 0}^{z = 4} ( r z \text{sin} \theta ) r d z d r d \theta .$$

Consider the region $$E$$ inside the right circular cylinder with equation $$r = 2 \text{sin} \theta ,$$ bounded below by the $$r \theta$$ -plane and bounded above by $$z = 4 - y .$$ Set up a triple integral with a function $$f ( r , \theta , z )$$ in cylindrical coordinates.
Answer: $$\iiint_{E} f ( r , \theta , z ) r d z d r d \theta = \int_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = \pi} \int_{r = 0}^{r = 2 \text{sin} \theta} \int_{z = 0}^{z = 4 - r \text{sin} \theta} f ( r , \theta , z ) r d z d r d \theta .$$

Question: Redo the previous example with the order of integration $$d \theta d z d r .$$
Answer: $$E = \{ ( r , \theta , z ) | 0 \le \theta \le 2 \pi , 0 \le z \le 1 , z \le r \le 2 - z^{2} \}$$ and $$V = \int_{r = 0}^{r = 1} \int_{z = r}^{z = 2 - r^{2}} \int_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = 2 \pi} r d \theta d z d r .$$

Question: Redo the previous example with the order of integration $$d \theta d z d r .$$
Answer: $$E_{2} = \{ ( r , \theta , z ) | 0 \le \theta \le 2 \pi , 0 \le r \le 1 , r \le z \le \sqrt{4 - r^{2}} \}$$ and $$V = \int_{r = 0}^{r = 1} \int_{z = r}^{z = \sqrt{4 - r^{2}}} \int_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = 2 \pi} r d \theta d z d r .$$

Question: Set up a triple integral for the volume of the solid region bounded above by the sphere $$\rho = 2$$ and bounded below by the cone $$\phi = \pi \text{/} 3 .$$

Use rectangular, cylindrical, and spherical coordinates to set up triple integrals for finding the volume of the region inside the sphere $$x^{2} + y^{2} + z^{2} = 4$$ but outside the cylinder $$x^{2} + y^{2} = 1 .$$
Answer: Rectangular: $$\int_{x = -2}^{x = 2} \int_{y = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{4 - x^{2}}}^{y = \sqrt{4 - x^{2}}} \int_{z = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{4 - x^{2} - y^{2}}}^{z = \sqrt{4 - x^{2} - y^{2}}} d z d y d x - \int_{x = -1}^{x = 1} \int_{y = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{1 - x^{2}}}^{y = \sqrt{1 - x^{2}}} \int_{z = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{4 - x^{2} - y^{2}}}^{z = \sqrt{4 - x^{2} - y^{2}}} d z d y d x .$$ Cylindrical: $$\int_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = 2 \pi} \int_{r = 1}^{r = 2} \int_{z = \text{unicode[:-]} \sqrt{4 - r^{2}}}^{z = \sqrt{4 - r^{2}}} r d z d r d \theta .$$ Spherical: $$\int_{\phi = \pi \text{/} 6}^{\phi = 5 \pi \text{/} 6} \int_{\theta = 0}^{\theta = 2 \pi} \int_{\rho = \text{csc} \phi}^{\rho = 2} \rho^{2} \text{sin} \phi d \rho d \theta d \phi .$$
